text.title: Persona Building Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Persona Building methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: cluster-from-research
step.action: Cluster transcripts by JTBD tags; surface 2-4 candidate segments.
step.decision-gate: If only 1 segment emerges, halt; recruit broader.

step.name: rank-and-pick-three
step.action: Pick primary (highest fit + reach), secondary (adjacent), negative (disqualifying).

step.name: compose-cards
step.action: Write persona-lean + persona-full + persona-negative per slot.

step.name: rank-pains
step.action: Force top-3 pain ranking; pain #1 named explicitly.

step.name: citation-audit
step.action: Confirm >=5 cited quotes per persona spanning >=3 different interviews.
step.decision-gate: If <5 quotes or single-source, reject and recruit more interviews.
